blob_store.description: Settings for the per-session blob store backing read_image / read_document.

byte_budget.description: Soft cap on total stored blob bytes per session. 0 = unbounded.

inline_threshold.description: Payloads at or below this size are inlined on the MessagePart instead of being stored as a blob.

read_image.description: Load an image file (.png/.jpg/.gif/.webp/.bmp) and return it as a multimodal MessagePart for the next LLM turn.

read_document.description: Load a document file (.pdf) and return it as a multimodal MessagePart for the next LLM turn.
